name: The Bogey Brothers
about: The Bogey Brothers is a golf simulator venue that utilizes Full Swing technology to provide an indoor golfing experience year-round. The facility features multi-sport simulators suitable for all skill levels, offering golf alongside other sports like baseball, basketball, and zombie dodgeball. The venue includes a full bar with a variety of beers and wines, operates on a pricing model that likely includes hourly bay rentals and memberships, and caters to both serious golfers and casual visitors seeking entertainment.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Full Swing dual-tracking technology for accurate ball flight
Access to over 45+ iconic PGA TOUR courses in high detail
Ability to play golf year-round regardless of weather
Multi-sport capability offering variety beyond just golf

food_and_drink.notes: Food is available, with 10% off for members.
Full bar available with a variety of draft beer, bottled beer, and red/white wine.

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitor providing 16 points of club and ball data with high-resolution video.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, but bringing your own clubs is highly encouraged. All clubs and balls must be cleaned before play to avoid damage to the screens and turf.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers a full bar with beer and wine, and food is available with a 10% discount for members.

faq.question: How long will it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: On average, it takes each golfer 1 hour to play 18 holes. For a group, allow 1 hour per person (e.g., a 4-some takes at least 4 hours). Beginner groups should allow an extra hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is suitable for golfers of all ages and skill levels, including juniors.
